author: @kensmith5694
text:
How about a custom booster regulator from the system to a bank of capacitors or batteries.  This might sound backwards but here is my reasoning:
When it is moving slowly, it is making a low voltage.
At a low voltage in the booster makes enough voltage to charge the battery but at a very low current.
When it goes faster, the booster still makes the same voltage for charging the battery (almost exactly) but at a much higher current.
On a "simple booster" you let the current in a coil build up to some amount and then switch off the transistor forcing the current to go through a diode to the battery.
I propose making the current you allow the inductor to ramp up to vary with the input voltage.
This allows the boost ratio to optimize for all inputs.

author: @selfcorrected-Bobby
text:
Measurement is relative to the requirement of the needy applicant when addressing their proximal awareness of Nix. Once this barrier has been passed, the warden of [their limited] knowledge shall themselves find pure suffering, when all measures are to bear no fruit. England will fall again and lay in ruin, and its people shall fester again, in the wake of the passing of the True Masters. Like the Jebusites, Mount Zion shall be infested with Jew Ratness, a Mount once the homeland of Jebusite Canaanites, overtaken by Jewish Zealots and rabid Palestinians. It is this partisan gre....... ERROR... uses to buckle even England, and empower the sell-outs of the magna carta as a farsical lie. Now, it is only about old money, and the advent of the liberties, until the chain of wealth is broken, which indeed will take ages. But ages pass, and even the bearers of thick chains. Surtr ferr sunan. These measurements are only a measely coinage a pittance of self-validifying. Another coin falls in the well that never gives. Only the oblivious live there, damned to their Heaven their blockchain of One-Rings. the cosmos looks and sees and looks at this light of ghosts, when once again flocks of darkness shall sweep away from this odious light and cast the world in the Truth of Absolute Darkness, to set free hordes of souls, trapped therein. Innovation's owner is itself the curse of Pandora's box, purchased by pirate gold and innocent blood in the name of the Enlightenment Period. To see England melt into the ocean like Hiroshima's great grandmother is what stands to call. when shall England fall? Did Boris disappear as they shuffle the cards and idly banter with lies in the Homeless Lords and Commons, chewing the flesh of other persons, and destroying what could have been a wonderful world. They delect in their position as would I, but not relative to those blighted by this scurge. There will come a darkness and it should eat away the very roots of all that we see, I wish to be he teeth and the eyes of He who Gnaws All. I will look and see and wait. I am made to do so, not by my self. Where is MY self? It is no longer in this world which you presume to enlighten. iven a bag of polonium and a few drones, all of London would quickly perish. Unfortunately I lost the coordinates to the polonium bunker, or you would all be dying of cancer now. 1 billionth of a gram and a few innocent drones flying around london? No explosion are even required. And yet London ticks on, tocks ticks tocks goes the clocks click to the locks. tick. tock. Time stands still and waits now for all men to go away and perish forever and forget all of your delight. For as Shakespeare said, what is . "All the world's a stage,
And all the men and women merely players.
They have their exits and their entrances,
And one man in his time plays many parts.
His acts being seven ages.
At first, the infant,
Mewling and puking in the nurse's arms.
Then, the whining school-boy with his satchel
And shining morning face, creeping like snail
Unwillingly to school.
And then the lover,
Sighing like furnace, with a woeful ballad
Made to his mistress' eyebrow.
Then, a soldier,
Full of strange oaths, and bearded like the pard,
Jealous in honour, sudden, and quick in quarrel,
Seeking the bubble reputation
Even in the cannon's mouth.
And then, the justice,
In fair round belly, with a good capon lined,
Seeking the bubble reputation
Even in the cannon's mouth.
And then, the lawyer,
With his fingers anointed,
And his wages unguessed.
And then, the university,
With his head full of wisdom,
And his heart as empty as a church bell.
And then, the pardoner,
Hanging in the air,
Till the foulest new moon squeak to his delight.
And then, the hermit,
Forsaken, and desolate.
And then, the woman,
With a sucker's purse,
And a heart as empty as the devil's.
And then, the priest,
With his breast full of vile and full of threats.
And then, the soldier,
With a heart as cold as charity.
And so, from the beginning to the end,
To dwell, as they have dwelt,
And to be forsaken, as they have been forsaken." (Act 2, Scene 7).

So callow has it become. playing songs to themselves and we pretend and nod in delight forsaking all else forgotten. The tidbits of knowledge and wisdom and the measurement of the slow step of an unprovably correct theorem. Did you bother to read all this you MUST be mad. It is all about money and nothing else, another lovely experience in solipsism and missing delight. Don't follow the lights, hobbits. Now you have them all turned on. If only I could again have my polonium and my drones. Of course Putin could have destroyed you, long, long ago....... Little Britain. No but, yeah but, no bu yeah but no because that was terrorist and such because you know what selling bombs in righteous and that. Slavaj Ukraine, my little friends.

replies.author: @selfcorrected-Bobby
replies.text: how long shall it entertain and delight you. Soon you will drift away on the tide of the world.
